title: Framework & Library Integration API
actors: Framework/Library (e.g. Laravel, Symfony, Guzzle, Curl, Kafka)

use_cases.name: Register Integration
use_cases.description: Calls Integration::init(): int on each enabled integration to register hooks. Returns NOT_LOADED, LOADED, or NOT_AVAILABLE constant.
use_cases.precondition: ddtrace PHP extension must be loaded

use_cases.name: Check Integration Eligibility
use_cases.description: Integration::shouldLoad(name) verifies ddtrace ext is present and ddtrace_config_integration_enabled(name) is true. Emits E_USER_WARNING if ext missing.

use_cases.name: Instrument Framework Method
use_cases.description: Inside init(), concrete integration calls \DDTrace\trace_method(), \DDTrace\hook_method(), or \DDTrace\install_hook() to attach span-creation closures to framework class methods.

use_cases.name: Configure Trace Analytics
use_cases.description: Integration::addTraceAnalyticsIfEnabled(SpanData $span) reads DD_TRACE_ANALYTICS_ENABLED and per-integration rate config. Top-level integrations (frameworks) default enabled; others require explicit opt-in via requiresExplicitTraceAnalyticsEnabling().

use_cases.name: Resolve Span Service Name
use_cases.description: Integration::handleInternalSpanServiceName(SpanData, fallbackName, skipFlattening) applies DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED (flat names from root span) and DD_SERVICE_MAPPING overrides.

use_cases.name: Handle Orphan Span
use_cases.description: Integration::handleOrphan(SpanData) rejects sampling (DD_TRACE_PRIORITY_SAMPLING_AUTO_REJECT) if DD_TRACE_REMOVE_AUTOINSTRUMENTATION_ORPHANS=true and span is a parentless RootSpanData.

use_cases.name: Emit Debug/Warning/Error Log
use_cases.description: Classes using LoggingTrait call logDebug/logWarning/logError(message, context[]), which delegate to Logger::get()->debug/warning/error(). isLogDebugActive() guards expensive debug calls.
use_cases.flow: LoggingTrait → Logger::get() → LoggerInterface impl (ErrorLogLogger | NullLogger | DebugLogger)

use_cases.name: Configure Global Logger
use_cases.description: Logger::set(LoggerInterface) replaces the singleton logger. Logger::get() auto-creates ErrorLogLogger(DEBUG) if DD_TRACE_DEBUG=true, else NullLogger(EMERGENCY). Logger::reset() clears it.

use_cases.name: Capture Inferred Span
use_cases.description: InferredSpanData (extends SpanData) is referenced via RootSpanData::$inferredSpan. Represents spans inferred from distributed trace context without explicit instrumentation.
use_cases.note: Used for inferred upstream spans in distributed tracing scenarios

key_interfaces_and_classes.name: DDTrace\Integrations\Integration (abstract class)
key_methods: public static function handleInternalSpanServiceName(SpanData $span, string $fallbackName, bool $skipFlattening=false)

key_interfaces_and_classes.name: DDTrace\Log\AbstractLogger (abstract, implements LoggerInterface)
key_interfaces_and_classes.notes: Manages enabledLevels map based on log level threshold

key_interfaces_and_classes.name: DDTrace\Tests\DebugLogger (test utility, extends AbstractLogger)
key_interfaces_and_classes.notes: Captures records in-memory for assertions. Methods: debug, warning, error, has(level,msg), hasOnly(level,msg), all()

key_interfaces_and_classes.name: DDTrace\InferredSpanData (extends SpanData)
key_interfaces_and_classes.notes: Represents inferred upstream span; attached to RootSpanData::$inferredSpan

key_relationships: DDTrace\Integrations\Integration implements DDTrace\Integration (interface from C ext)
LoggingTrait used_by classes that need diagnostic logging (e.g. integrations, tracer)
Logger returns LoggerInterface impl: ErrorLogLogger | NullLogger | DebugLogger
InferredSpanData extends SpanData; referenced by RootSpanData::$inferredSpan
Integration::init() calls \DDTrace\trace_method / install_hook / hook_method (C ext APIs)
important_notes: Each concrete integration must define const NAME and implement static init(): int. The C-level ddtrace ext drives lifecycle by calling init() and checking return codes (NOT_LOADED/LOADED/NOT_AVAILABLE). LoggingTrait provides static diagnostic logging; Logger singleton auto-selects ErrorLogLogger (DD_TRACE_DEBUG=true) or NullLogger at runtime. DebugLogger is test-only for in-memory log capture.
